inputs.label: Bottleneck Utilization (%)
inputs.businessContext: Current utilization rate of the primary bottleneck resource, measured over a representative period (e.g., last 4 weeks).

businessContext_i18n.en: Current utilization rate of the primary bottleneck resource, measured over a representative period (e.g., last 4 weeks).

inputs.label: Average Demand Rate (units/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average customer demand rate for the product family flowing through the bottleneck.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average customer demand rate for the product family flowing through the bottleneck.

inputs.label: Bottleneck Capacity (units/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum theoretical output rate of the bottleneck resource under ideal conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum theoretical output rate of the bottleneck resource under ideal conditions.

inputs.label: Proposed Investment Cost ($)
inputs.businessContext: Total capital expenditure required for the bottleneck improvement (e.g., new equipment, tooling, automation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total capital expenditure required for the bottleneck improvement (e.g., new equipment, tooling, automation).

inputs.label: Expected Capacity Increase (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage increase in bottleneck capacity after the investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage increase in bottleneck capacity after the investment.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: Total planned operating hours of the bottleneck resource per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total planned operating hours of the bottleneck resource per year.

inputs.label: Profit Margin per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Contribution margin (revenue minus variable cost) per unit of product flowing through the bottleneck.

businessContext_i18n.en: Contribution margin (revenue minus variable cost) per unit of product flowing through the bottleneck.

inputs.label: Quality Yield at Bottleneck (%)
inputs.businessContext: First-pass yield (percentage of good units) at the bottleneck operation.

businessContext_i18n.en: First-pass yield (percentage of good units) at the bottleneck operation.

inputs.label: Planned Maintenance Downtime (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total operating time allocated to planned maintenance for the bottleneck.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total operating time allocated to planned maintenance for the bottleneck.

inputs.label: Implementation Risk Factor
inputs.businessContext: Qualitative assessment of the risk that the investment will not achieve the expected capacity increase.

businessContext_i18n.en: Qualitative assessment of the risk that the investment will not achieve the expected capacity increase.

rules.message: Demand rate exceeds current bottleneck capacity; investment is critical.
Investment cost must be greater than zero.
Expected capacity increase cannot be negative.
Quality yield below 50% indicates severe quality issues; consider root cause analysis before investment.

thresholds.message: Negative ROI – investment is not financially justified.
Payback period exceeds 5 years; consider alternative investments.
Bottleneck utilization below 70% – consider if this is the true bottleneck.
Negative capacity gap – demand already exceeds capacity; investment is urgent.

formulas.label: Effective Capacity (units/hour)
formulas.description: Current bottleneck capacity adjusted for quality yield and planned maintenance downtime.

formulas.label: Capacity Gap (units/hour)
formulas.description: Difference between demand rate and effective capacity. Positive value indicates excess capacity; negative indicates a deficit.

formulas.label: New Bottleneck Capacity (units/hour)
formulas.description: Projected bottleneck capacity after investment, including quality and maintenance adjustments.

formulas.label: Additional Throughput (units/year)
formulas.description: Expected increase in annual good units produced through the bottleneck after investment.

formulas.label: Annual Financial Benefit ($/year)
formulas.description: Additional profit generated from the increased throughput.

formulas.label: Return on Investment (ROI) (%)
formulas.description: Simple return on investment percentage, adjusted by risk factor.
formulas.expression: ((annual_benefit / investment_cost) * 100) * case when risk_factor = 'low' then 1.0 when risk_factor = 'medium' then 0.8 else 0.5 end

formulas.label: Payback Period (years)
formulas.description: Time required to recover the investment from annual benefits.

primary.label: Investment Priority Score
primary.description: Composite score (0-100) indicating the priority of this bottleneck investment. Higher score = higher priority.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Quality Loss (units/hour)
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Units lost due to defects at the bottleneck.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Maintenance Loss (units/hour)
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Capacity lost due to planned maintenance downtime.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Demand Loss (units/hour)
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Unmet demand due to capacity gap (if negative).

suggestedActions.label: Increase Quality Yield
suggestedActions.description: Implement Six Sigma DMAIC project to reduce defects at bottleneck. Target yield improvement from current to 98%.
suggestedActions.impact: Increases effective capacity without capital investment.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Planned Maintenance Downtime
suggestedActions.description: Apply TPM (Total Productive Maintenance) to optimize maintenance schedule and reduce downtime by 2%.
suggestedActions.impact: Increases effective capacity at low cost.

suggestedActions.label: Consider Alternative Investment
suggestedActions.description: If ROI is low or payback period long, evaluate process improvement (Lean) or outsourcing before capital expenditure.

suggestedActions.label: Validate Bottleneck Identification
suggestedActions.description: Use value stream mapping and cycle time analysis to confirm the identified resource is the true bottleneck.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Score
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Score (0-100) reflecting the reliability of input data based on completeness and consistency.
dataConfidenceAdjusted.calculation: if all inputs are within valid ranges and no validation alerts triggered then 90 else 60
